name: QA 854
description:
PCP QA Test No. 854

Check PMCD state change notification, aka PMCD_ADD_AGENT



This one checks sample.dynamic.meta.pmdesc.sem ... see also qa/1055



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat, Inc.
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 854

Check PMCD state change notification, aka PMCD_ADD_AGENT

This one checks sample.dynamic.meta.pmdesc.sem ... see also qa/1055

Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat, Inc.
